tools.name: search_repositories
tools.description: Search for GitHub repositories by query.

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.description: Read the contents of a file in a repository.

tools.name: delete_repository
tools.description: Permanently delete a repository and all its data.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List recent transactions for a customer account.

tools.name: issue_refund
tools.description: Refund a charge to the customer's credit card.

tools.name: transfer_funds
tools.description: Wire funds from one account to another. Irreversible.

tools.name: run_sql
tools.description: Execute an arbitrary SQL query against the production database.

tools.name: export_patient_records
tools.description: Export patient medical records to a file.
